name: All Alone with Mannie
short_description: All Alone with Mannie is a difficult, quick reflex, survival horror game where your only tools of defense is a flashlight and a dingy flower blanket. ...Your only downfall, is your eyes...
detailed_description:
You play role of a child that has awoken in the middle of the night by mysterious powder outage and a voice to warn you that something sinister is in the house.
Can you hold Mannie off as long as you can until help arrives? or will you succumb to a horrible fate worse than death...?

Let's... see...

This game has a unique mechanic where every time the character blinks, Mannie moves around the room.

You can look under the bed or ceiling to see if Mannie is there.

You can also hide underneath the covers if she enters the room.

Watch your surroundings.


This game was created using the Pixel Game Maker MV engine.
